response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a strong background in software development with experience in system architecture, performance optimization, and hardware-adjacent work (e.g., robotic arms, real-time systems). However, his direct experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, and deep-learning workload optimization is limited. His educational background (BS in Computer Science) combined with 12+ years of experience meets the Bachelor's degree requirement, but his profile lacks clear alignment with the Principal-level focus on hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive experience in system architecture and performance optimization across diverse domains (e.g., robotic arms, real-time systems)
Proven track record in hardware-software integration (e.g., C/C++ for LabWindows/CVI, Dlang for low-latency apps)
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, AI optimization at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization
No evidence of SIMD/MIMD architecture experience or GPU workload analysis
Lacks formal graduate-level education (e.g., PhD or Master's) in a relevant field, which is preferred for Principal-level roles
